free_text: neutron booster target used as a pulsed
lithium, enriched to 96% Li-6 , 1.3 cm in diam. and
1.3 cm thick. The scintillator is mounted on a 9524B
photomultiplier. A resolution of about 16% was
obtained on the width of the neutron peak.
